headline: Kernicterus Market Research and Forecast Report 2026-2036 Featuring Pfizer, F.Hoffmann La Roche,. Merck, AbbVie, AsteraZeneca, Abbott Laboratories, Sanofi, GlaxoSmithKline, Grifols
summary: The kernicterus market is experiencing growth, fueled by an increase in neonatal jaundice cases, particularly among preterm infants. Major drivers include advancements in neonatal screening protocols and the development of non-invasive diagnostic tools like transcutaneous bilirubinometers. Phototherapy innovations, including LED and IoT-enabled systems, enhance treatment efficiency and patient monitoring.
